comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration ping/pong framed packet ids and bodies by splitting generated frames and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id in each direction.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::{Clientbound, Serverbound}, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Configuration ping/pong framed dispatch/decode; not a runtime ping-response or keep-alive test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration ping/pong packet framing and dispatch/decode only; it does not prove runtime ping response behavior, keep-alive behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
